parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const siteSlug = ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.siteSlug || ''); const query = '*[_type==\"article\" && siteSlug==\"' + siteSlug + '\" && status==\"published\"]|order(publishedAt desc)[0...500]{publishedAt}'; return 'https://' + $('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.projectId + '.api.sanity.io/v' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.apiVersion || '2025-01-01') + '/data/query/' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.dataset || 'production') + '?query=' + encodeURIComponent(query); })() }}

={{ (() => { const siteSlug = ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.siteSlug || ''); const query = 'count(*[_type==\"topicCandidate\" && siteSlug==\"' + siteSlug + '\" && status==\"brief_ready\"])'; return 'https://' + $('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.projectId + '.api.sanity.io/v' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.apiVersion || '2025-01-01') + '/data/query/' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.dataset || 'production') + '?query=' + encodeURIComponent(query); })() }}

number.value1: ={{ Number($json.noWorkNeeded === true && $json.note === 'No brief_ready topics available' && $json.refillDue === true) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ siteSlug: $json.siteSlug, count: Number($env.PLAN_TOPIC_REFILL_COUNT || 60), status: 'brief_ready', source: 'suggest', replace: true, apply: true }) }}
